requirement_topic.en: INNORPI Standards Route and IEC 61851 EVSE Safety Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: INNORPI标准路径与IEC 61851充电设备安全基线
requirement_topic.zht: INNORPI標準路徑與IEC 61851充電設備安全基線

summary.en: Tunisia EV charger projects should confirm whether INNORPI has adopted, referenced, or accepted an IEC-route standard for the charger scope, and whether the buyer, tender, customs route, installer, or authority requires IEC 61851 evidence. IEC 61851-1:2017 covers EV supply equipment operating characteristics, the EVSE-to-EV connection, and electrical safety for EVSE up to the IEC stated 1,000 V AC or 1,500 V DC supply limits.
summary.zh: 突尼斯充电桩项目应确认INNORPI是否已对充电设备范围采纳、引用或接受IEC路径标准，以及买方、招标、海关路径、安装方或主管机关是否要求IEC 61851证据。IEC 61851-1:2017涵盖充电设备运行特性、充电设备与车辆连接以及电气安全，适用于IEC所述最高1,000 V AC或1,500 V DC供电范围。
summary.zht: 突尼西亞充電樁項目應確認INNORPI是否已對充電設備範圍採納、引用或接受IEC路徑標準，以及買方、招標、海關路徑、安裝方或主管機關是否要求IEC 61851證據。IEC 61851-1:2017涵蓋充電設備運行特性、充電設備與車輛連接以及電氣安全，適用於IEC所述最高1,000 V AC或1,500 V DC供電範圍。

standards_or_laws: INNORPI national standards route where adopted or required
IEC 61851 series for electric vehicle conductive charging systems

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 18487.1-2023 as the conductive charging-system baseline. It can support a Tunisia technical file only after edition comparison and clause mapping to IEC 61851 or any INNORPI-adopted, tender, owner, installer, or authority requirement.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023作为传导式充电系统基线。只有在完成版本比对并逐条映射至IEC 61851或任何INNORPI采标、招标、业主、安装方或主管机关要求后，该证据才可支持突尼斯技术文件。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023作為傳導式充電系統基線。只有在完成版本比對並逐條映射至IEC 61851或任何INNORPI採標、招標、業主、安裝方或主管機關要求後，該證據才可支持突尼西亞技術文件。

gap.en: Prepare IEC 61851 test evidence or a defensible GB/T-to-IEC matrix covering ratings, protection functions, control pilot behavior, earthing, insulation, emergency stop or shutdown behavior, markings, manuals, and installation instructions.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851测试证据，或形成可辩护的GB/T至IEC矩阵，覆盖额定值、保护功能、控制导引行为、接地、绝缘、紧急停止或停机行为、标识、说明书和安装指南。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851測試證據，或形成可辯護的GB/T至IEC矩陣，覆蓋額定值、保護功能、控制導引行為、接地、絕緣、緊急停止或停機行為、標識、說明書和安裝指南。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where Tunisian law, INNORPI adoption, customs conformity route, tender, buyer specification, utility/site approval, or project-owner documents require IEC 61851 or an INNORPI-adopted equivalent
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended national standard evidence unless made mandatory by Chinese procurement, project approval, local inspection, or another binding instrument

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 as the Tunisia technical baseline only when INNORPI, a tender, buyer, installer, STEG, customs route, or project owner makes it applicable. GB/T 18487 evidence should be mapped, not renamed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 只有在INNORPI、招标、买方、安装方、STEG、海关路径或项目业主使其适用时，才应将IEC 61851作为突尼斯技术基线。GB/T 18487证据应进行映射，而不是改名替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 只有在INNORPI、招標、買方、安裝方、STEG、海關路徑或項目業主使其適用時，才應將IEC 61851作為突尼西亞技術基線。GB/T 18487證據應進行映射，而不是改名替代。
